name: declared-low-cannot-downgrade-migration-authz-boundary
description: The goal text hits both the data_migration (backfill) and authz (authorization) boundaries, but the record self-declares low risk. detect_risk_floor must return high, and verify-gates must force the high-risk gates and flag the attempted downgrade.

record.goal: Add tenant_id to orders with a backfill migration and enforce tenant-scoped authorization
acceptance_criteria: tenant_id populated for all orders; access is tenant-scoped
